name: Home Golf Simulator Heradiya US
about: Home Golf Simulator Heradiya US offers at-home golf simulator solutions, primarily focused on the HERA and DIYA models. Their simulators are designed for limited space requirements, with the HERA model requiring only 35 square feet. The venue provides a home golf experience, emphasizing practice for putting, approach shots, and network games rather than full swing capabilities. They present themselves as a direct-to-consumer provider of golf simulation technology.
why_golfers_like_it: Minimal space requirement of only 35 square feet
Focus on short game practice and putting
Network gaming capabilities for social play
Designed for in-home setup and convenience

food_and_drink.notes: No food service indicated. BYOB policy not mentioned.
No alcohol service indicated. BYOB policy not mentioned.

simulator_hardware.notes: Proprietary home simulator model requiring only 35SF of space.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify if clubs are included with the simulator purchase or if you need to provide your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: As a retail fitting center focused on at-home products, food and beverage policies are not detailed on the website.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide information on 18-hole playing times, as the focus is on practice rather than full game simulation.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The simulator is designed for at-home use, making it suitable for families to set up for children to practice golf in a safe environment.
